name: news_search
description: Searches news articles from indexed publications with filtering by language, category, publication date, and relevance. Returns article titles, sources, publication dates, and summaries.

query.description: The news search query. Supports keywords, entity names, and natural language questions.
query.$comment: Supports boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT) depending on backend search engine capabilities.

num_results.description: Number of news articles to return.
num_results.$comment: Cap at 50 to balance completeness with response payload size for real-time news queries.

language.description: ISO 639-1 two-letter language code to filter articles by publication language.
language.$comment: ISO 639-1 chosen for broad compatibility with news APIs (e.g., NewsAPI, GDELT). Defaults to 'en' server-side.

published_after.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime string to filter articles published after this timestamp.
published_after.$comment: Optional filter; when omitted, the backend determines the default historical window (typically 30 days).

category.description: News category to restrict results to a specific topic domain.
category.$comment: Categories align with major news aggregator taxonomy (NewsAPI, Google News). 'general' includes uncategorized articles.

sort_by.description: Determines the ordering of returned news articles.
sort_by.$comment: 'relevance' uses search engine ranking score; 'date' returns most recently published articles first.
